hero.headline: Tailored Trust for Every Industry
hero.subHeadline: GateFlow's infrastructure is flexible enough to handle the unique security nuances of any gated physical space.

compounds.title: Residential Compounds
compounds.subtitle: Security meets convenience for compound management.
compounds.description: Give every resident full control over who enters their home — while giving management complete visibility and an unbreakable audit trail.

hero.headline: Give every resident control. Keep every gate secure.
hero.sub: Replace paper logbooks and WhatsApp chaos with cryptographically-signed visitor passes, resident self-service, and real-time audit logs.

painPoints: Manual paper logbook — error-prone, impossible to audit
WhatsApp QR screenshots shared freely, no expiry control
Management has zero visibility into gate activity

residents.title: Resident self-service visitor QRs
residents.description: Residents create time-limited, signed visitor passes directly from the app or portal — without calling management.

trades.title: Unit-based access quotas
trades.description: Set monthly visitor limits per unit type. The system enforces them automatically, eliminating disputes.

complaints.title: Full audit log + analytics
complaints.description: Every entry is logged with timestamp, gate, QR code, and operator identity. Export to CSV in one click.

quote.text: We eliminated our paper logbook and now have a real-time view of every entry. Residents love the app.
quote.author: Ahmed Hassan

events.title: Mass Events
events.subtitle: Lightning-fast access for high-volume crowds.
events.description: From ticket list to gate control in minutes. Handle tens of thousands of scans per hour with zero downtime — even offline.

hero.headline: From ticket list to gate control — in minutes.
hero.sub: Upload your guest list via CSV, generate signed QR passes instantly, and scan offline with no internet dependency.

painPoints: Long entry queues from manual ID and ticket checks
No offline backup when the internet drops at peak time
Zero post-event data on actual attendance or gate throughput

speed.title: Bulk CSV QR generation
speed.description: Upload a guest list and generate thousands of signed, single-use QR passes in under 60 seconds.

fraud.title: 100% offline scanning
fraud.description: Scanners queue offline using AES-256 encrypted local storage. Sync automatically when connectivity returns.

reports.title: Post-event analytics export
reports.description: Download detailed scan logs by gate, hour, and QR code type. Prove attendance numbers to sponsors.

quote.text: We scanned 2,000 guests in 90 minutes with zero queue. The offline mode saved us when the venue WiFi died.
quote.author: Sarah Al-Masri

clubs.title: Exclusive Clubs & Marinas
clubs.subtitle: Discrete, high-end guest management.
clubs.description: Membership access that runs itself. Enforce recurring schedules, track every visit per member, and prevent card sharing.

hero.headline: Membership access that runs itself.
hero.sub: HMAC-signed membership QRs that enforce time windows, prevent sharing, and give your operations team a per-member audit trail.

painPoints: Lost or shared membership cards with no way to invalidate them
No way to restrict access to specific days or time windows
No visibility into who actually came — or how often

vip.title: Recurring access schedules
vip.description: Configure day-of-week and time-window restrictions per membership tier. The gate enforces them automatically.

discreet.title: HMAC-signed membership QR
discreet.description: Every QR is cryptographically signed and bound to a member. Forwarding it to a friend does not work.

revocation.title: Per-member scan history
revocation.description: See exactly when each member visited, which gate, and how many guests they brought — per day or month.

quote.text: Members love the QR pass on their phone. We love the audit trail — we finally know who's actually using their membership.
quote.author: Operations Manager

schools.title: Private Schools
schools.subtitle: Unbreakable perimeter security for educational campuses.
schools.description: Every parent pre-approved. Every entry recorded. Give the gate team a process that works — without burdening admin staff.

hero.headline: Every parent pre-approved. Every entry recorded.
hero.sub: Issue QR passes per pickup. Guard-only scanner role. Immutable audit log. No unknown visitors at the gate — ever.

painPoints: Unknown visitors showing up at the gate with no pre-approval
Guards overwhelmed — writing IDs by hand, creating bottlenecks
No permanent record of who entered, when, or who authorized it

pickup.title: Parent pre-approval flow
pickup.description: Admin creates a visitor QR per authorized pickup person. The guard scans — GateFlow does the rest.

audit.title: Guard-only scanner role
audit.description: Gate operators get scanner-only access. No admin panel, no sensitive data — just scan and proceed.

offline.title: Immutable audit log
offline.description: Every entry is permanently timestamped with gate ID, QR code, and operator. Exportable for incident reports.

quote.text: The gate team finally has a process that doesn't depend on memory. We haven't had an unauthorized entry since launch.
quote.author: Head of Security
quote.role: Head of Security, Cairo International School

coreInfrastructure.title: Core Infrastructure
coreInfrastructure.description: All solutions share our hardened core infrastructure, ensuring maximum reliability and security regardless of vertical.

security.title: Enterprise Security
security.description: HMAC-signed QR and AES-256 data encryption at rest.

sync.title: Instant Sync
sync.description: Real-time audit log synchronization between all gates.

mobile.title: Mobile Native
mobile.description: Guard-optimized apps for tablets and mobile devices.

whitelabel.title: White-label Ready
whitelabel.description: Custom branding for developers and property managers.
